meta.title: Scrutix — The Operating System for Modern Campaigns
meta.description: Scrutix is the all-in-one electoral campaign platform with AI agents, voter CRM, field operations, and multichannel communications. Used by 180+ campaigns in 12 countries.

hero.headline: The Operating System for Modern Campaigns
hero.subheadline: Scrutix unifies your voter CRM, field operations, and AI agents in one platform — so your campaign runs smarter, faster, and wins.

problem.headline: Campaigns run on fragmented tools.

points.title: Scattered data
points.description: A CRM here, spreadsheets there, WhatsApp everywhere. No single source of truth.

points.title: No intelligence
points.description: Data gets collected but never becomes action. Your team guesses instead of acts.

points.title: Field blindness
points.description: You don't know what's happening on the ground until it's too late to react.

problem.bridge: Scrutix brings everything together — and adds the AI layer that turns data into decisions.

features.headline: Three pillars. One platform.
features.subtitle: Everything your campaign needs to organize, communicate, and win.

tabs.title: Campaign Operations
tabs.subtitle: Everything your campaign needs in one place
items: Unified voter CRM with smart segmentation
Canvassing & field ops with offline mobile app
Email, SMS, WhatsApp — all in one inbox
Geographic mapping & territory management with PostGIS

tabs.title: AI Intelligence
tabs.subtitle: The brain behind your campaign
items: Intelligence Center with real-time proactive suggestions
Predictive voter scoring and engagement analysis
Content generation aligned with your platform
tabs.quote: Scrutix doesn't just store your data — it tells you what to do with it. Our AI agents monitor your campaign 24/7 and surface the actions that move the needle.

tabs.title: Mobile Field App
tabs.subtitle: Your team, everywhere — even offline
items: Offline-first: operates up to 72h without connectivity

aiAgents.headline: Six AI agents. One mission:
aiAgents.description: Scrutix agents run continuously in the background, analyzing your campaign data and taking action — with your approval. No prompts needed. No dashboards to check. Just results.

agents.name: Contact Intelligence
agents.description: Qualifies and enriches new contacts automatically

agents.name: Field Follow-up
agents.description: Schedules canvassing retries and escalates cold contacts

agents.name: Smart Communications
agents.description: Optimizes send times, generates A/B variants, monitors drops

agents.name: Territory Optimizer
agents.description: Redistributes volunteers to maximize coverage before election day

agents.name: Campaign Monitor
agents.description: Daily briefing, anomaly detection, corrective action suggestions

agents.name: Content Generator
agents.description: Drafts speeches, scripts, and messages aligned to your platform

aiAgents.controlDescription: Every critical action requires your approval. Scrutix AI acts fast — but you always have the final say.

integrations.headline: Connects with the tools your campaign already uses
integrations.footnote: Open API available for custom integrations

pricing.headline: Simple pricing. Serious results.
pricing.subtitle: Start free for 14 days. No credit card required.
pricing.footnote: AI credits included in every plan. Scale as your campaign grows.

items.quote: We went from 3 disconnected tools to one platform. Our field coverage went up 40% in the first month.
items.name: María González

items.quote: The AI suggestions are the real game changer. It flagged a drop in engagement in our northern districts before we even noticed.
items.name: James Whitfield

items.quote: Finally a platform built for how campaigns actually work — not how software companies think they work.
items.name: Ana Ferreira

finalCta.headline: Your next campaign deserves better tools.
finalCta.subtitle: Join hundreds of campaigns already running on Scrutix.
